hyperedges.label: Sale Creation Atomic Flow: create + resolveItems + runCreateTransaction + student balance debit
Session Authentication Lifecycle: sessions API + session model + authentication model
Financial Reports Cluster: balances, credits, sales reports all guarded by read:report:financial
RBAC Persona-Permission System: Operador / Supervisor / Administrador
User Account Management: create, list, patch via /users and /users/:username
Unified Credit Balance Pool: manual credits + packages share student balance

nodes.label: Typed Error Contract (name/message/action/status_code)
nodes.rationale: All error classes expose a toJSON() method returning {name, message, action, status_code} to keep the API error shape stable and never leak internals.

nodes.label: RBAC Role-Feature Map
nodes.rationale: Role features are derived hierarchically: ADMIN inherits SUPERVISOR which inherits OPERADOR. Manual per-user feature overrides are merged on top via getEffectiveFeatures, enabling additive RBAC without altering role definitions.

nodes.label: filterOutput Output Sanitization Pattern
nodes.rationale: filterOutput centralizes what fields are safe to expose per feature, preventing accidental data leaks. Inline permission logic in handlers is explicitly forbidden by the constitution.

nodes.label: DB Table: users
nodes.rationale: uuid PK, unique username (30 chars, mirroring GitHub limit) and email (254 chars), bcrypt password (60 chars), timestamptz UTC columns — rationale comments in migration cite each choice.

nodes.label: DB Table: sessions
nodes.rationale: Stores opaque session tokens with expires_at for server-side session validation. expires_at > NOW() check is the auth gate.

nodes.label: DB Table: students
nodes.rationale: balance is DECIMAL(10,2) on the student row; credit transactions separately track history. No enrollment/guardian per decision record.

nodes.label: DB Table: credit_transactions
nodes.rationale: Single monetary pool; amount must be positive; type is manual|package; optional expires_at for package credits; balance_after snapshot denormalized for audit.

nodes.label: DB Table: sales + sale_items
nodes.rationale: sale_items child table holds line items with snapshot unit_price; reversed_at+reversed_by allow soft reversal by supervisor/admin; payment_method: credit|cash|card.

nodes.label: DB Table: cash_closes
nodes.rationale: One close per operator per date (unique constraint). Stores aggregated totals by payment method. Non-blocking (pending status exists only in report queries).

nodes.label: Sale creation uses DB transaction to atomically debit balance and insert sale+items
nodes.norm_label: sale creation uses db transaction to atomically debit balance and insert sale+items

nodes.label: Balance check done twice: pre-flight and inside transaction with row-level lock to prevent race conditions
nodes.norm_label: balance check done twice: pre-flight and inside transaction with row-level lock to prevent race conditions

nodes.label: Product price is snapshotted (unit_price) at sale time, not referenced dynamically
nodes.norm_label: product price is snapshotted (unit_price) at sale time, not referenced dynamically

nodes.label: Session expiration is 30 days; token is 48 random bytes hex-encoded
nodes.norm_label: session expiration is 30 days; token is 48 random bytes hex-encoded

nodes.label: findOneValidByToken validates expires_at > NOW() in SQL to reject stale sessions
nodes.norm_label: findonevalidbytoken validates expires_at > now() in sql to reject stale sessions

nodes.label: New users get role='pending' and features=['read:activation_token'] by default, preventing access until activated
nodes.norm_label: new users get role='pending' and features=['read:activation_token'] by default, preventing access until activated

nodes.label: 5-minute cancellation window for operators; supervisors/admins can reverse any time
nodes.norm_label: 5-minute cancellation window for operators; supervisors/admins can reverse any time

nodes.label: Password recovery silently ignores NotFoundError to prevent email enumeration attacks
nodes.norm_label: password recovery silently ignores notfounderror to prevent email enumeration attacks

nodes.label: GET /products returns only active products to operators; supervisors/admins see all including inactive
nodes.norm_label: get /products returns only active products to operators; supervisors/admins see all including inactive

nodes.label: Operators see only their own sales (operatorId filter); supervisors/admins see all sales
nodes.norm_label: operators see only their own sales (operatorid filter); supervisors/admins see all sales

nodes.label: Supervisors can close cash on behalf of another operator via operator_id body field
nodes.norm_label: supervisors can close cash on behalf of another operator via operator_id body field

nodes.label: Package-type credit transactions require create:package permission separate from create:credit
nodes.norm_label: package-type credit transactions require create:package permission separate from create:credit

nodes.label: PRD Summary — Sistema Integrado de Gestão de Cantina
nodes.norm_label: prd summary — sistema integrado de gestao de cantina

nodes.label: Fechamento de Caixa — Daily Cash Close
nodes.norm_label: fechamento de caixa — daily cash close

nodes.label: Recuperação de Senha — Self-Service Password Reset
nodes.norm_label: recuperacao de senha — self-service password reset

nodes.label: Atomic Token Consumption (TOCTOU-safe) for Password Reset
nodes.norm_label: atomic token consumption (toctou-safe) for password reset

nodes.label: Price Snapshot on Sale (unit_price) — Prevents Retroactive Price Change
nodes.norm_label: price snapshot on sale (unit_price) — prevents retroactive price change

nodes.label: Soft Delete for Sale Reversal (reversed_at/reversed_by) — Preserves History
nodes.norm_label: soft delete for sale reversal (reversed_at/reversed_by) — preserves history

nodes.label: Cash Close is Non-Blocking — Avoids Operational Deadlock
nodes.norm_label: cash close is non-blocking — avoids operational deadlock

nodes.label: Single Credit Pool for Packages and Manual Credits
nodes.norm_label: single credit pool for packages and manual credits

nodes.label: Supervisor Cannot Manage Supervisor/Admin Accounts — Separation of Privilege
nodes.norm_label: supervisor cannot manage supervisor/admin accounts — separation of privilege

nodes.label: No Multi-Tenancy in This Phase — Avoids Over-Engineering
nodes.norm_label: no multi-tenancy in this phase — avoids over-engineering
